issueIdOrKey.description: Issue key like "PROJ-123" or numeric issue ID.

descriptionText.description: Set the issue description as plain text (converted to ADF).

labels.description: Set the full labels array (replaces existing labels).

assigneeAccountId.description: Assign to this accountId, or null to unassign.

fields.description: Advanced: direct Jira fields object. This is passed through to the Jira API. Use only if you know Jira field formats.

update.description: Advanced: Jira update operations object. Use for add/remove operations on fields like labels.
